title: astragalus floccosifolius
intro: Astragalus floccosifolius, also known as the woolly milkvetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits of Astragalus floccosifolius are said to include enhanced immune function, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health. Astragalus floccosifolius can be prepared as a decoction, capsule, or extract, and is often used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
